name: 2-Panel Split
description: Two panels side by side, each with a heading and three sub-items

fields.LEFT_HEAD: heading for left panel max 4 words
fields.LEFT_SUB1: left sub item one max 5 words
fields.LEFT_SUB2: left sub item two max 5 words
fields.LEFT_SUB3: left sub item three max 5 words
fields.RIGHT_HEAD: heading for right panel max 4 words
fields.RIGHT_SUB1: right sub item one max 5 words
fields.RIGHT_SUB2: right sub item two max 5 words
fields.RIGHT_SUB3: right sub item three max 5 words
fields.VERDICT_TEXT: one sentence conclusion from the script
